### install foundry-rs/forge-std
```shell
$ forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit --no-git
```
### install openzeppelin-contracts
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts  --no-git
```

### install openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable  --no-git
```

### deploy 
```shell
$ forge script script/Deploy.s.sol -vvv --rpc-url=https://bsc.blockrazor.xyz --broadcast --private-key=[privateKey]
```

#### Lex token: 0x7a7Dc63DC73b25eBCC6553BF58e7596056585b0F
  #### Leo token: 0x128676c1Cc1F89d288bF96a43e38Ace0E4674ff0
  #### USDT test token: 0x4b0F190B57FcC327091364D108d7ef9A5b7c6693
  =========================================================
  #### Treasury: 0xd050670225b66546067229527afB843d19487466
  #### TreasuryLiquidity: 0xd6B948d9fBDd801866F724f76194544282BC8cf6
  #### NodeDividends: 0x897F92941feE47B08BA0AD9266e3b30f07cDA0be
  #### Queue: 0x3Bd0B24AE205ac0B3DE423498A33a943ad0Df166
  #### Referrals: 0x3500057026F380FC5b3e5eE71047C55dD962a224
  #### Router: 0xf3BFFB95DFb7D12b70fDB16D96ECDE797920cb71
  #### Exchange: 0xFa05eb9cBC83201a6d793c06DC03B99F397C85Fa
  #### Payback: 0xd904a36E12E2ebc2e7dC0477F462E5109d3b2f05


### build router constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(address,address,address,address)" 0xd050670225b66546067229527afB843d19487466  0x3Bd0B24AE205ac0B3DE423498A33a943ad0Df166 0x3500057026F380FC5b3e5eE71047C55dD962a224 0x4b0F190B57FcC327091364D108d7ef9A5b7c6693
```
### verify router contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0xf3BFFB95DFb7D12b70fDB16D96ECDE797920cb71 src/Router.sol:Router  --constructor-args 0x000000000000000000000000d050670225b66546067229527afb843d194874660000000000000000000000003bd0b24ae205ac0b3de423498a33a943ad0df1660000000000000000000000003500057026f380fc5b3e5ee71047c55dd962a2240000000000000000000000004b0f190b57fcc327091364d108d7ef9a5b7c6693 --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build lex constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEX" "LEX" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0x9990815e5c32F0c1ff2fc7746b3f448cc35B40A3 0x4b0F190B57FcC327091364D108d7ef9A5b7c6693
```

### verify lex contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x7a7Dc63DC73b25eBCC6553BF58e7596056585b0F src/token/Lex.sol:Lex  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build leo constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEO" "LEO" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0xBF69aC91b3F0022e3335062824DC64a5Fc3Ab24C 0x33197a1d84Ec164413853B227174166c71475Db4

```

### verify leo contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x128676c1Cc1F89d288bF96a43e38Ace0E4674ff0 src/token/Leo.sol:Leo  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```
